item.title: India’s central bank mandated use of .bank domains to enhance trust – but its registry leaked sensitive info https://www.theregister.com/security/2026/06/30/indias-central-bank-mandated-use-of-bank-do
item.description: pIndia’s central bank mandated use of .bank domains to enhance trust – but its registry leaked sensitive info a href="https://www.theregister.com/security/2026/06/30/indias-central-bank-mandated-use-of-bank-domains-to-enhance-trust-but-its-registry-leaked-sensitive-info/5264152"theregister.com/secur

item.title: Jose explains why frontier AI may keep its pricing power. “I think the frontier is always going to be way more expensive and create way more of the economic value.”
item.description: pJose explains why frontier AI may keep its pricing power.br /br /“I think the frontier is always going to be way more expensive and create way more of the economic value.”/pa href="https://nitter.net/Delphi_Digital/status/2070526449111769369#m"br /Videobr / img src="https://nitter.net/pic/amplify_
